response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ development experience on Windows in capital markets or fixed-income domains, with most of their career focused on JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web/mobile stacks; while they have some C++ exposure from 2007–2008 in LabWindows, it is outdated and not aligned with modern financial systems requirements.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across diverse technologies and domains
Strong track record in open-source contributions and developer tooling
Demonstrated expertise in CI/CD, testing, and DevOps practices
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ experience on Windows platform
Lacks demonstrated fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure
SQL experience is listed but not contextualized in high-volume financial systems
